software.assessmentDescription: Test your knowledge of software engineering principles.

questions.questionText: What is the primary purpose of software engineering?
options: To design and develop hardware components.
To study the theoretical foundations of computer science.
To apply engineering principles to the design, development, and maintenance of software systems.
To analyze and solve complex mathematical problems.
questions.correctAnswer: To apply engineering principles to the design, development, and maintenance of software systems.

questions.questionText: The waterfall model is an iterative software development methodology.
What is the difference between a bug and a defect?
questions.correctAnswer: A bug is a deviation from the expected behavior of a software system, while a defect is a specific instance of a bug that has been identified and needs to be fixed.

questions.questionText: Which software development methodology emphasizes iterative development and customer feedback?
What are the core principles of object-oriented programming?

Data-Structures-and-Algorithms.assessmentDescription: Test your understanding of data structures and algorithms.

questions.questionText: What is the time complexity of linear search?
A stack is a LIFO data structure.
What is the difference between breadth-first search (BFS) and depth-first search (DFS)?
questions.correctAnswer: BFS explores all neighbor nodes at the present depth prior to moving on to the next depth level, while DFS explores as far as possible along a branch before backtracking.

Software.assessmentDescription: Test your basic software engineering knowledge.

questions.questionText: What is the purpose of software testing?
questions.correctAnswer: To identify and fix bugs, ensuring the software meets requirements.

questions.questionText: What is the primary purpose of software engineering?
options: To design and develop hardware components.
To apply engineering principles to software systems.
To study theoretical foundations of computer science.
questions.correctAnswer: To apply engineering principles to software systems.

questions.questionText: Agile methodology emphasizes iterative development and customer feedback.
